raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht/ tik teefcham ka'es
dshweju/ fakka tas Klings
KUNGS: Es dorrifchu tewi
arridsan affinafku/un tas Affins
tewi wajahs/ tapehz ka tu Affi-
ni effi cenihdejs:/ tad ir tas Aff-
fins tewi wajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es darrischu Seira Kal-
nu par ihstenu pohstu Weetu/ un
isdeldeschu no winna tik labbi
to/ kas pahr to eet/ ka to kas at-
greeschahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es peepildischu winna
Kalnuu ar winna Nokauteem us
taweem Pakalneem/ un tawas
Eeleijâs/ un wiſſôs tawos
Strautds gullehs tee Nokautee
zaur Sohbinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es darrischu tewi par muh-
schigu pohstu Weetu/ un tawi
Pilssahti ne taps eedsihwoti/ ta
juhs tajuttifeet/ ka cs etnin tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ka tu fakki:
Schihz divi Tautas un schihz
divi Walsts man tiks Rohkâ/
un mehs gribbain tahs eeman-
tobt/ jepfchu tas KUNGS pats
tur buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht/ tik teefcham ka
cs dshwoju/ fakka tas Klings
KUNGS: Ir es darrischu pehz
tawas Bahrśibas/ un pehz ta-
waz Skandivas/ ka tu no ta-
vas Eenaidivas pretti teem effi
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu fajuttifi/ ka es
KUNGS efmu wiſſas tan
Saimofchanas dsirdejs/ ko
prett Israëta Kalneem effi r
najs/ un fazzijs: Tee irr po-
ti/ tee irr muine no-ehst doht
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta effat juhs ar juh
Muttes prett manni lee-
fchees/ un juhsus Wahrdus p
manni wairojschi/ es etmu
dsirdejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas Klings
KUNGS: Es darrischu t
par pohstu Weetu/ ta ka wi-
Semmei buhs preezatees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Itt ka tu effi preeza-
pahr to eemantojamu Teefu
Israëta Namma/ tapehz ka
pohstita irr/ tapatt darrischu-
pee tewim/ Seira Kalni un u
Eedomis taps wiſſnotat par p
stu Weetu/ un tee fajuttifs
es tas KUNGS efmu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
